DP.281.0000:
Welcome to the Exchange Service
Corner!\f
We can exchange your BP
for fabulous items.\f
DP.281.0001:
Which prize would you like in
exchange for your BP?
DP.281.0002:
You’ve chosen the [0108,0000].
Is that correct?
DP.281.0004:
I’m so sorry...
You don’t have enough BP...\f
DP.281.0005:
Sorry, your Bag has no room for
this [0108,0000]...\f
DP.281.0006:
Thank you for visiting.\f
Please visit us again when you have
saved up BP.
DP.281.0008:
What to get today...
Perhaps a Technical Machine will do.
DP.281.0009:
What I most care about is the
crushing power of my darling Pokémon.\f
Are there any prizes that would
help them get more power?
DP.281.0010:
How’s it going?\f
If things aren’t going well, why not
grab some prizes here?\f
It might toughen up your Pokémon
just enough to do better.
DP.281.0011:
Gramma, Gramma!
I went and traded!\f
You can have this, Gramma!\f
DP.281.0012:
Oh, what is it, dear?
Oh, a Sludge Bomb...\f
Why, thank you so much, dear.\f
You’re such a cute, tough, and kind
girl...\f
I feel blessed to have a grandchild
like you...
DP.281.0013:
Did you see that little girl with her
grandmother upstairs?\f
That girl is a little terror in battle.
You never can judge people!
DP.281.0014:
This building is so grand...
Why does it need to be so?
